case_title: CITIBANK, N.A. VS. JOHANNA O THOMAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, JOHANNA O JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
